summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of SLS Fleet Management System - core modules (Users, Vehicles, Drivers, Tenders, Alerts, Approvals) all functional with modal views working as expected. Backend APIs (20/21 passed), frontend navigation and CRUD operations all working.

minor.issue: Approval card in UI shows empty entity_data fields (submitter, owner, plant) though API returns data - likely frontend display issue

ui_bugs.issue: Approval card shows 'VEHICLE:' with empty submitter name, owner, and plant fields

issues: Console warning: In HTML, <tr> cannot be a child of <span> - hydration error from React rendering
Console warning: DialogContent requires DialogTitle for accessibility - missing aria-describedby

action_items: Fix ApprovalQueue.js to properly display entity_data (submitter?.name shows undefined but API returns data)
Add aria-describedby to Dialog components for accessibility
Reports page returns 404/redirect - consider adding a Reports component or removing from sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: Approval card entity_data display: Check line 73-74 in ApprovalQueue.js - entity_data?.vehicle_no shows empty but API returns data, need to verify data binding
Table row rendering: React hydration warnings in VehicleList, DriverList, UserManagement suggest possible SSR/CSR mismatch with dynamic table rows

success_rate.frontend: 95% (All core features working, minor display issues)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST_ prefixed users and tenders for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core modules tested: 1) Vehicle/Driver modals with tabs (Details, Documents, Assignment, History) working, 2) Tender CRUD with view/edit/delete working, 3) User management with create/edit/deactivate working, 4) Alert center with filters and View Vehicle/Driver actions working, 5) Navigation: Dashboard, Vehicles, Drivers, Plants, Stoppages, Tenders, Approvals, Alerts, Users all accessible. Reports link redirects to Dashboard.
passed_tests: Dashboard with stats (268 vehicles, 201 drivers, 1 tender)
Vehicle list with search, filters, modal view with tabs
Driver list with search, filters, modal view with tabs
Tender management - View, Edit, Add tender with tabs (Basic Info, Financial, Vehicles)
User Management - list, add, edit, search, status toggle
